SELECT d, isinf(d) FROM test_dates WHERE d IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE isinf(d) = TRUE;
SELECT a.d, b.od, isinf(a.d) AS is_a_inf, isinf(b.od) AS is_b_inf FROM test_dates a JOIN other_dates b ON a.d IS NOT NULL AND b.od IS NOT NULL;
SELECT d, isinf(d) FROM (SELECT d FROM test_dates WHERE d != DATE 'infinity') AS subquery;
SELECT CASE WHEN isinf(d) THEN 'Infinite' ELSE 'Finite' END AS date_status FROM test_dates;
